title: Buttery Crunchy Saudi Arabian Kielbasa Bake
description: A sweet and savory brunch dish featuring kielbasa, perfect for a weekend morning. The crunchy texture from the breadcrumbs and the sweetness of the honey make this dish a crowd-pleaser.
instructions: Line a 9x13-inch baking dish with parchment paper.
In a large skillet, cook the kielbasa over medium-high heat until lightly browned, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the kielbasa to a plate and set aside.
In the same skillet, add the butter and melt over medium heat.
Add the breadcrumbs and cook, stirring frequently, until golden brown and crispy, about 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, honey, shredded cheddar cheese, salt, black pepper, and granulated sugar.
Stir in the plain Greek yogurt and chopped fresh parsley.
Add the cooked kielbasa, breadcrumbs, and egg mixture to the prepared baking dish.
Toss until everything is well coated with the egg mixture.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the kielbasa is cooked through and the top is golden brown.
Let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve warm, garnished with additional chopped parsley if desired.
